stemHtml: What are the main sources of error in a pilot’s decision-making mechanism?

options.a: Identification of tactical actions in the given situation; anticipating the consequences of the available options.
options.b: Biases affecting unprejudiced decision making; external factors such as peer pressure and group behaviour.
options.c: Determination of the situational risk or hazard; assessment of the environmental circumstances.
options.d: Situation assessment and its associated level of risk; selection of the appropriate course of action.
